CustomField.description: A checked box means the property will show up on Current Listing on the Public Web Page when status is "Available for Rent" or "Available for Sale". Uncheck when an applicant is certified (rental) or we receive a signed purchase agreement (sale).
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
A checked box means the property will show up on Current Listing on the Public Web Page when status is "Available for Rent" or "Available for Sale".
Uncheck when an applicant is certified (rental) or we receive a signed purchase agreement (sale).
CustomField.label: Property Web Listing
